preferred_sources.name: DataReportal
preferred_sources.notes: Always use the latest Digital report for [[Country]] from DataReportal For internet & social media stats.

preferred_sources.name: EF EPI
preferred_sources.notes: Source for English proficiency ranking and Scores.

preferred_sources.name: Official Government Websites
preferred_sources.notes: Search for Regional dialects and their adoption using the official stats office domain for the given country (e.g. .gov or .gob).

preferred_sources.name: Script and Writing Direction
preferred_sources.notes: Source of Script direction. Search the writing direction and if the country has more than one script.
